title: Causal Reasoning in Language Models and Agents

candidate_queries.query: ((ti:causal OR abs:causal OR abs:counterfactual) AND (ti:LLM OR abs:LLM OR ti:"language model" OR abs:"language model")) AND (cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG)
((ti:causal OR abs:causal) AND (ti:agent OR abs:agent) AND (abs:intervention OR abs:planning OR abs:tool use)) AND (cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG)

precision_queries.query: ((abs:"counterfactual evaluation" OR abs:"counterfactual benchmark" OR abs:"causal benchmark") AND (abs:"language model" OR abs:llm))
